zh.lifeSummary: 當Donnchad MacGille Críst - Fifth Earl of Angus於1170年出生在蘇格蘭Forfarshire福爾法爾時，他的父親Gille Crist 4th Earl of Angus16歲，母親Marjory of Scotland18歲。他和Beatrix de Douglas至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1214年在他的家鄉享年44歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林登福姆林 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: MacGille
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McGill
meanings: Scottish and Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Ghoill ‘son of the stranger (or lowlander)’ (see Gall 1).

Irish and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac (an) G(h)iolla (Irish) or Mac (an) G(h)ille (Scottish) ‘son of the lad’ (i.e. ‘servant’), or a short form of a personal name formed by attaching this element to the name of a saint, in the sense ‘devotee’.

nameMeanings.name: Críst
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: apparently a nickname from Middle English Crist, Old English Crīst ‘Christ’ (see Christ ), possibly applied as a nickname for someone who played the part of Christ in a pageant.
English: from a pet form of the personal names   Christian   or   Christopher  .
Americanized form of German, Dutch, Czech, or Slovak   Krist   and German or Dutch   Christ  .

variants.name: Crest
meanings: English: possibly a variant of   Crist  .

variants.name: Criste
meanings: German and English: variant of   Crist  .

variants.name: Christ
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Fritz, Kurt, Erwin, Franz, Georg, Gerhard, Heinz, Inge, Klaus, Liselotte, Udo.

German and Dutch: from a short form of the personal name Christian , or a nickname meaning ‘the Christian’. In both cases it is (ultimately) from the Latin name Christus ‘Christ’, which is from Greek Christos, a derivative of chriein ‘to anoint’, a calque of Hebrew mashiaḥ ‘Messiah’, which likewise means literally ‘the anointed’. This is the title given to Jesus of Nazareth (see Jesus ), as embodying the fulfilment of Messianic prophecy and expectation; he is the central figure of Christianity and most Christians believe he is the incarnation of God the Son. Compare Chrest , Crist , Ghrist , and Krist .
English: variant of   Crist  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Donnchad
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Gaelic: compound of Old Celtic donn ‘brown’ + chadh ‘chief’ or ‘noble’.

variants.name: Duncan
meanings: Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Donnchadh , also used among people without Scottish connections. This was the name of a 7th-century Scottish saint (abbot of Iona) and two medieval kings of Scotland. The final ‐n in the Anglicized form seems to be the result of confusion with the Gaelic word ceann ‘head’ in the Latinized form Duncanus. Compare Irish Donagh .

en.lifeSummary: When Donnchad MacGille Críst - Fifth Earl of Angus was born in 1170, in Forfar, Forfarshire, Scotland, his father, Gille Crist 4th Earl of Angus, was 16 and his mother, Marjory of Scotland, was 18. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Beatrix de Douglas. He died in 1214, in his hometown, at the age of 44, and was buried in Dunfermline Abbey, Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Donnchad MacGille Críst - Fifth Earl of Angus est né en 1170, à Forfar, Forfarshire, Écosse, son père, Gille Crist 4th Earl of Angus, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Marjory of Scotland, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Beatrix de Douglas. Il est décédé en 1214, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Dunfermline Abbey, Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Donnchad MacGille Críst - Fifth Earl of Angus 1170 in Forfar, Forfarshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gille Crist 4th Earl of Angus 16 und seine Mutter Marjory of Scotland 18. Er hatte mit Beatrix de Douglas mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1214 im Alter von 44 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Dunfermline Abbey, Dunfermline, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Donnchad MacGille Críst - Fifth Earl of Angus è nato il nel 1170 nel Forfar, Forfarshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Gille Crist 4th Earl of Angus, aveva 16 anni e il suo madre, Marjory of Scotland, aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Beatrix de Douglas. Morì nel 1214, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Dunfermline Abbey, Dunfermline, Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Donnchad MacGille Críst - Fifth Earl of Angusが1170年にスコットランドForfarshireフォーファルで生まれた時，父Gille Crist 4th Earl of Angusは16歳，母Marjory of Scotlandは18歳であった。彼はBeatrix de Douglasとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1214年に故郷で44歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインダンフエルムライン アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Donnchad MacGille Críst - Fifth Earl of Angus(이)가 1170년 스컷랜드 Forfarshire 포파르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gille Crist 4th Earl of Angus(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Marjory of Scotland(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Beatrix de Douglas(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1214년 그의 고향에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 던퍼라이인 던퍼라이인 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Donnchad MacGille Críst - Fifth Earl of Angus nasceu em 1170, em Forfar, Forfarshire, Scotland, seu pai, Gille Crist 4th Earl of Angus, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Marjory of Scotland, tinha 18 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Beatrix de Douglas. Ele faleceu em 1214, em sua cidade natal, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Dunfermline Abbey, Dunfermline, Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Donnchad MacGille Críst - Fifth Earl of Angus родился в 1170 г. в местности форфар, Forfarshire, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Gille Crist 4th Earl of Angus было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Marjory of Scotland, 18. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Beatrix de Douglas. Он умер в 1214 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности дунфирмлаин эбби, дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания.

Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Beatrix de Douglas. Murió en 1214, en su pueblo, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Dunfermline Abbey, Dunfermline, Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido.
